response:
# JSON Ad (Advertisement) Format

Here are some common JSON structures used for **digital advertising**:

---

## 📦 Basic Ad Object

```json
{
  "ad": {
    "id": "ad_001",
    "title": "Summer Sale - 50% Off!",
    "description": "Shop the biggest sale of the year.",
    "brand": "ShopNow",
    "type": "banner",
    "status": "active",
    "url": "https://shopnow.com/sale",
    "image": "https://cdn.shopnow.com/ads/summer-sale.jpg",
    "cta": "Shop Now"
  }
}
```

---

## 🎯 Ad with Targeting

```json
{
  "ad": {
    "id": "ad_002",
    "title": "Learn to Code in 30 Days",
    "type": "video",
    "format": "pre-roll",
    "duration": 30,
    "targeting": {
      "age_range": [18, 35],
      "gender": ["male", "female"],
      "interests": ["technology", "education", "programming"],
      "locations": ["US", "CA", "UK"],
      "devices": ["mobile", "desktop"],
      "languages": ["en"]
    },
    "budget": {
      "daily_limit": 500.00,
      "total_budget": 10000.00,
      "currency": "USD",
      "bid_type": "CPM",
      "bid_amount": 3.50
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 📊 Ad Campaign Structure

```json
{
  "campaign": {
    "id": "camp_101",
    "name": "Q4 Holiday Campaign",
    "advertiser": "BrandX",
    "status": "running",
    "start_date": "2024-11-01",
    "end_date": "2024-12-31",
    "objective": "conversions",
    "ads": [
      {
        "id": "ad_003",
        "title": "Holiday Deals Are Here",
        "type": "display",
        "size": "300x250",
        "creative": {
          "headline": "Up to 70% Off This Holiday!",
          "body": "Limited time offers on top brands.",
          "image_url": "https://cdn.brandx.com/holiday-ad.jpg",
          "cta_button": "Get Deal",
          "landing_page": "https://brandx.com/holiday"
        },
        "metrics": {
          "impressions": 125000,
          "clicks": 3200,
          "ctr": 2.56,
          "conversions": 480,
          "spend": 1750.00,
          "cpc": 0.55,
          "roas": 4.2
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

---

## 📱 Native Ad Format

```json
{
  "native_ad": {
    "id": "native_001",
    "sponsored_by": "TechGadgets",
    "headline": "The Smartwatch You've Been Waiting For",
    "body": "Track fitness, get notifications, and more.",
    "image": {
      "url": "https://techgadgets.com/watch-ad.jpg",
      "width": 1200,
      "height": 628,
      "alt": "SmartWatch Pro"
    },
    "icon": {
      "url": "https://techgadgets.com/logo.png",
      "width": 100,
      "height": 100
    },
    "cta": "Buy Now",
    "click_url": "https://techgadgets.com/smartwatch",
    "impression_tracker": "https://track.ads.com/imp?id=native_001",
    "click_tracker": "https://track.ads.com/click?id=native_001"
  }
}
```

---

## 🔁 OpenRTB Bid Request (Simplified)

```json
{
  "id": "bid_req_001",
  "imp": [
    {
      "id": "1",
      "banner": {
        "w": 728,
        "h": 90,
        "format": [
          { "w": 728, "h": 90 },
          { "w": 970, "h": 90 }
        ]
      },
      "bidfloor": 0.50,
      "bidfloorcur": "USD"
    }
  ],
  "site": {
    "id": "site_001",
    "name": "News Portal",
    "domain": "newsportal.com",
    "cat": ["IAB12", "IAB1"],
    "page": "https://newsportal.com/article/123"
  },
  "user": {
    "id": "user_abc123",
    "age": 28,
    "gender": "M"
  },
  "device": {
    "ua": "Mozilla/5.0...",
    "ip": "192.168.1.1",
    "devicetype": 2,
    "os": "Android"
  },
  "at": 2,
  "tmax": 150,
  "cur": ["USD"]
}
```

---

## 📈 Ad Performance Report

```json
{
  "report": {
    "period": "2024-10-01 to 2024-10-31",
    "campaign_id": "camp_101",
    "summary": {
      "total_impressions": 500000,
      "total_clicks": 12500,
      "avg_ctr": 2.5,
      "total_spend": 6800.00,
      "total_conversions": 950,
      "avg_cpc": 0.54,
      "avg_cpm": 13.60,
      "roas": 5.1
    },
    "breakdown_by_day": [
      {
        "date": "2024-10-01",
        "impressions": 16000,
        "clicks": 400,
        "spend": 220.00,
        "conversions": 30
      },
      {
        "date": "2024-10-02",
        "impressions": 17500,
        "clicks": 450,
        "spend": 245.00,
        "conversions": 35
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

---

## 🔑 Key Ad Metrics Explained

| Key | Meaning |
|-----|---------|
| `CTR` | Click-Through Rate (clicks/impressions × 100) |
| `CPM` | Cost Per 1000 Impressions |
| `CPC` | Cost Per Click |
| `CPA` | Cost Per Acquisition |
| `ROAS` | Return On Ad Spend |
| `CVR` | Conversion Rate |

---

Would you like a specific ad format like **Google Ads**, **Facebook Ads**, **OpenRTB**, or a custom structure? 😊
